“龙国人，你们得好好在你们自己身上找原因？锁血回城挂是害了你们？”
“像我们大美丽，自带自适应！哈哈哈！”
“现在弱肉强食，怪谈降临，你们过不了，怪谁呢？”
蓝星怪谈降临，
龙国已经连败九场，濒临灭国。
而美丽国，人均斩杀线生存强者，场场连胜。
不断嘲讽。
穿越蓝星的邓天看着这一个个诡异怪谈，神色古怪，陷入了沉思？
好家伙？
这些怪谈很难吗？
【诡异羊村怪谈】？【血色狗熊岭怪谈】？【绝望猫鼠怪谈】？【死亡比奇堡怪谈】？
....
“这不都是童年小快乐吗？怎么在这个世界，就变成怪谈了呢？”
一查，
原来是蓝星人，没有童话故事。
“哦！那没事了！”
“是时候，展现真正的技术了！”
进入怪谈...
邓天发现，自己还能看到【隐藏规则】
邓天瞬间秒变歪嘴龙王。
“还有谁？”
当一个个规则怪谈被邓天【完美通关】，直接覆灭，无数规则加身...
邓天成就至高规则概念体。
独断万古！
镇压诸世！
亿万诡异世界匍匐于其身下....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/16c2cac1875acb2fd726acebb5ca0fc0","author":"小小小小飞刀","author_id":"","book_id":"7591768678266326078","book_name":"规则怪谈VS概念神灰太狼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591807435778572862","read_count":"26964","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"477470"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.5","serial_count":"227","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,穿越,副本,规则怪谈,开局,国运,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8bc74ede250134925315f03172a172c4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449710&x-signature=MpdjP27%2FzRVjH49da%2FwmaIZab8Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2861403585904761","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5
